svg.title: LLM proxy agency platform — repository structure
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing the five packages: proxy-core, render-service, data-layer, dashboard, and evals, with their internal modules and runtime labels.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the proxy-core Cloudflare Worker package')
sendPrompt('How does the bot detection and fingerprint scoring work in proxy-core?')
sendPrompt('What does the transform module do in proxy-core?')
g.text: HTML parse · schema inject · Q&A · entities

sendPrompt('How does Puppeteer pre-render pages?')

sendPrompt('What does AnomalyDetector flag?')

g.text: React · client analytics UI · not started
